image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: appearing on counter, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S037. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 灯光闪烁后熄灭又亮起; 镜子外多了一只红杯; 镜子里的人影消失. narration intent: Narrator explains "灯光熄灭又亮起，镜子外多了一只红杯，镜子里少了一个人。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "你出来了？". shot positive notes: Medium shot of kitchen counter with a red mug appearing, mirror in background showing empty reflection, flickering light, suspenseful atmosphere.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: appearing on counter, must remain visually consistent. shot S037. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 灯光闪烁后熄灭又亮起; 镜子外多了一只红杯; 镜子里的人影消失. narration intent: Narrator explains "灯光熄灭又亮起，镜子外多了一只红杯，镜子里少了一个人。". dialogue mood: Protagonist A says "你出来了？". shot positive notes: Medium shot of kitchen counter with a red mug appearing, mirror in background showing empty reflection, flickering light, suspenseful atmosphere.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, static, flat lighting, mirror, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 灯光熄灭又亮起，镜子外多了一只红杯，镜子里少了一个人。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
